name: codescape-ai
displayName: Codescape — AI Code Quality & Impact Graph
description: Security, code quality, SOLID analysis, AI-powered fixes, and an interactive code impact graph. Works with Ollama, Groq, HuggingFace, and more.

commands.title: Codescape: Show Blast Radius for Current File
Codescape: Show Impact for Symbol at Cursor
Codescape: Safety Check (What Breaks if I Change This)

enumDescriptions: Local models via Ollama — 100% free, no account, no key
Groq cloud — free account, no credit card, very fast
Hugging Face Inference API — free account, huge model selection
Anthropic Claude — paid API key required
Any OpenAI-compatible server (LM Studio, vLLM, llama.cpp)
codescape.aiProvider.markdownDescription:
Which AI backend to use.

**Free options:** `ollama` (no account), `groq` (free account), `huggingface` (free account)
codescape.aiProvider.description: AI provider. Default is Ollama, which runs locally and free. Install from ollama.com, run "ollama pull llama3.2", and it works with no API key. Switch to a cloud provider and set aiApiKey if preferred.

codescape.aiModel.markdownDescription:
Model name. Leave blank for the recommended default.

**Ollama:** `qwen2.5-coder:7b` `llama3.2` `codellama`

**Groq:** `qwen-2.5-coder-32b` `llama-3.3-70b-versatile`

**HuggingFace:** `Qwen/Qwen2.5-Coder-7B-Instruct`
codescape.aiModel.description: Model name for the chosen provider. For Ollama, a model you have pulled (e.g. llama3.2, qwen2.5-coder). For cloud providers, their model id.

codescape.aiApiKey.markdownDescription:
API key for cloud providers.

- **Ollama / LM Studio:** leave empty
- **Groq:** free key at https://console.groq.com
- **HuggingFace:** free token at https://huggingface.co/settings/tokens
- **OpenRouter:** free key at https://openrouter.ai

codescape.aiBaseUrl.description: Base URL for the chosen provider. Default is the local Ollama server. Cloud providers override this automatically when blank is not used.

codescape.analyzeOnSave.description: Automatically analyze the file every time you save.

codescape.enableAiAnalysis.description: Run AI deep analysis automatically when files are analyzed. Off by default because it runs a local/remote model and can be CPU/GPU heavy. AI features (Understanding Doc) still work on demand when this is off.

codescape.preciseRelationships.markdownDescription:
Use the language server's call hierarchy for **ground-truth** caller/callee relationships in the Understanding Doc, instead of the fast built-in heuristic.

More accurate, but slower (it queries the language server per symbol) and depends on the relevant language extension being installed and indexed (TypeScript works out of the box; Python needs Pylance; Java needs the Java extension). When the language server can't resolve a symbol, Codescape falls back to the heuristic for that symbol.

Only affects the Understanding Doc — live features always use the fast heuristic.

codescape.complexityThreshold.description: Cyclomatic complexity threshold — functions above this are flagged.

codescape.duplicateLineThreshold.description: Minimum number of identical lines to flag as a duplicate block.

codescape.languages.description: List of language IDs to analyze.
